regions.text: Blood requires a healthy heart and oxygen from the lungs. These depend on the stomach for food and the nervous system for overall control.
(Diagram: A detailed system map showing arrows between MUSCLES, NERVES, BLOOD STREAM, STOMACH, LUNGS, and HEART).
The entire body is a network of systems working together. nervous system: the complete network of nerves in the body.
FUTURE: will control. PRESENT: control(s). PAST: controlled.
